name: backlog-md-manager
title: Backlog.md Manager
description: Manage Backlog.md tasks from Raycast — create, browse, search, edit, and change status across multiple projects using the backlog CLI.
author: nicholas_ferguson

preferences.name: backlogPath
preferences.title: Backlog CLI Path
preferences.description: Path to the backlog binary (leave empty to use 'backlog' from PATH)

commands.name: list-tasks
commands.title: List Tasks
commands.subtitle: Backlog.md
commands.description: Browse tasks grouped by status with filtering by status and priority

commands.name: create-task
commands.title: Create Task
commands.subtitle: Backlog.md
commands.description: Create a new task with description, priority, labels, acceptance criteria, and file attachments

commands.name: search-tasks
commands.title: Search Tasks
commands.subtitle: Backlog.md
commands.description: Full-text search across all tasks in a Backlog.md project

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
